name: skillset_creator
description: Meta-SkillSet for developing KairosChain SkillSets. Provides Core-vs-SkillSet decision analysis, directory scaffolding, and multi-LLM review prompt generation. Use when creating a new SkillSet, deciding whether a change needs core modification, or preparing review prompts for SkillSet designs/implementations.
author: Dr. Masa Hatakeyama
